title: 2023 Singapore no-formal-design-education median compensation by career level
summary: Within the Singapore no-formal-design-education cohort (n=41), Junior IC respondents (n=12) reported a median total compensation of S$63,800 and Senior respondents (n=10) reported S$129,450. Mid-level, Lead/Staff, People Manager, Director, and VP cohorts within this subset fall below the minimum safe disclosure threshold and are not published individually. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: Cohort is the 41 Singapore respondents reporting no formal design education, broken out by career level. Only Junior IC (n=12) and Senior (n=10) meet the minimum n=10 threshold within this subset; other levels are suppressed. No respondent-level data is exposed.
